version_description: 80's pop dance feel. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes. Solo plays as verse. Interlude is an interesting change from the chorus so I left it as one large section. Outro returns to the familiar chorus figure repeating to fade.

versions.version_description: This version matches the studio recording tuning with easy chords by using the capo.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Wake Me Up When September Ends
